title: work-item
description: Object a source puller emits into a trigger inbox (W4 contract). Filename is p<prio>-<source>-<id>-r<rev>.json; body agrees on source/id/rev/prio.

id.description: Provider object id (lowercased in the filename identity).

source.description: Source name (e.g. github); first segment of identity.

title.description: Human-readable summary for cards and judgment.

url.description: Canonical upstream URL (empty string when the source has none).

rev.description: Sortable rev digits (under the filename r marker), from work_item_rev().

payload.description: Source-specific body; opaque to the kernel.

lane.description: Optional autonomy lane name when the puller pins one.
